final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, it is important to stay up to date on vaccinations, maintain good indoor airflow, practice physical distancing, wear masks in appropriate settings, wash hands frequently, and avoid close contact with sick individuals. These measures are supported by both local and external evidence [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001, doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023, doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006, doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016].
